response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Individual Contributor with strong backend and distributed systems skills, but lacks the executive leadership experience required for this CTO role. There is no evidence of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, communicating with boards, or managing managers. Furthermore, while he has some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, he lacks the deep, production-level architectural tenure in multi-agent AI systems demanded by the job description.
strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks and distributed systems.
Demonstrated experience with high-throughput microservices and event-driven architectures (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Some relevant fintech experience from his time at RIDE Capital, focusing on investment practices in Germany.
concerns: Zero demonstrated executive leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
AI and agentic framework experience appears very recent and limited compared to the deep architectural expertise required.
Profile is heavily skewed toward an Individual Contributor (IC) and software craftsman rather than an organizational leader and CTO.
